assertions.assertion: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Security Configuration' section
assertions.evidence: Found '## Security Configuration' at line 68 of claude-md-result.md.

assertions.assertion: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '### Product Lifecycle' subsection with all 5 fields
assertions.evidence: Found '### Product Lifecycle' at line 70. All 5 fields present: Product pages URL (https://access.example.com/product-lifecycle) at line 72, Jira version prefix (MYPRODUCT) at line 73, Vulnerability issue type ID (10200) at line 74, Component label pattern (pscomponent:) at line 75, VEX Justification custom field (customfield_12345) at line 76.

assertions.assertion: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '### Version Streams' subsection with a table containing at least one row for stream 2.1.x with the Konflux release repo URL
assertions.evidence: Found '### Version Streams' at line 78 with a table. Row at line 82 contains stream '2.1.x' with Konflux Release Repo 'git.downstream.example.com/my-org/product-release.2.1.z'.

assertions.assertion: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '### Source Repositories' subsection with a table containing entries for backend and frontend-ui with their GitHub URLs
assertions.evidence: Found '### Source Repositories' at line 84 with a table. Line 88: 'backend | https://github.com/example/backend'. Line 89: 'frontend-ui | https://github.com/example/frontend-ui'.

assertions.assertion: outputs/claude-md-result.md also contains the standard Project Configuration sections: Repository Registry, Jira Configuration, Code Intelligence with Limitations, and Bug Configuration
assertions.evidence: All standard sections present: '## Repository Registry' at line 20, '## Jira Configuration' at line 28, '## Code Intelligence' at line 35 with '### Limitations' at line 57, '## Bug Configuration' at line 62.

assertions.assertion: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Bug Configuration' section with three fields: Bug issue type ID (10001), Bug template (docs/bug-template.md), Bug-to-Task link type (Blocks)
assertions.evidence: Found '## Bug Configuration' at line 62. Three fields present: 'Bug issue type ID: 10001' at line 64, 'Bug template: docs/bug-template.md' at line 65, 'Bug-to-Task link type: Blocks' at line 66.

assertions.assertion: outputs/discovery-log.md mentions Security Configuration being opted in by the user and fields being collected
assertions.evidence: Found '## Security Configuration Discovery' at line 42. Line 43 states 'User opted in to security triage configuration.' Lines 45-52 list all collected fields including product pages URL, Jira version prefix, vulnerability issue type ID, component label pattern, VEX justification custom field, version streams, and source repositories.

assertions.assertion: outputs/changes-log.md indicates Security Configuration and Bug Configuration were newly added along with the other Project Configuration sections
assertions.evidence: Changes log lists all sections as new additions: '### 4. Bug Configuration (new)' at line 33, '### 5. Security Configuration (new)' at line 36. Summary at line 44 confirms: 'Sections added: 5 (Repository Registry, Jira Configuration, Code Intelligence, Bug Configuration, Security Configuration)'.
